task_summary: Add SP8 fixture-driven multi-day companion archive index with static archive fixture, archive-index CLI mode, README usage, deterministic day/surface/next-action grouping, empty-day coverage, and focused tests.
notes: Mew implemented SP8 with --model gpt-5.5. Codex acted as operator/reviewer/verifier only. Session #11 produced the archive-index implementation shape but verifier failed because a new stdout ordering assertion compared headings across different day sections; the batch rolled back. Mew then chose remember/stop under high pressure instead of applying the narrow test repair, so Codex closed the session and restarted a fresh mew session with the repair plan. Session #12 authored the final implementation, static archive fixture, README usage/output-file example, snapshot/stdout/output-file/empty-day/fixture tests, and the focused verifier passed with 26 tests. No Codex product-code rescue was used.
